description: Seven-task apples-to-apples comparison suite for local and hosted models.

tasks.name: Finance
tasks.tests: Numerical analysis and report writing from stock CSV data.

tasks.name: Apache
tasks.tests: Operational log triage, security interpretation, and recommendations.

tasks.name: Access anomaly
tasks.tests: Threshold-based event classification with JSON-only output.

tasks.name: Compression
tasks.tests: Faithful compression of a long research note while preserving uncertainty and evidence.

tasks.name: Family note
tasks.tests: Plain-language explanation under length, phrase, vocabulary, and sentence constraints.

tasks.name: Checklist
tasks.tests: Structured Markdown output with exact headings, bullets, lengths, and vocabulary.

tasks.name: Text lines
tasks.tests: Short-form formatting discipline across exact lines, sentences, bullets, and required words.
